description_long: This is a modern athletic shoe with a sleek, low-profile silhouette and a predominantly black upper. The shoe features a perforated design on the heel and midfoot for breathability, and a large, contrasting white swoosh-like stripe on the lateral side. The upper appears to be made of a synthetic mesh material, reinforced with overlays and blue accent stitching. The heel has a raised collar for ankle support and a visible logo patch. The sole is thick, flat, and black, likely made of rubber for traction and cushioning. The shoe lacks traditional laces, instead utilizing a slip-on or elastic closure system for easy wear.
description: A sleek black athletic shoe with a white side stripe, perforated heel, and slip-on design, featuring blue accent stitching and a thick rubber sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white stripe, perforated heel, and blue accent stitching on the black upper.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the raised heel collar, perforations, and a rectangular logo patch on the heel.
description_view_2: Medial side view with a fully black upper, visible perforations, and blue accent stitching, lacking the white stripe.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded toe, mesh texture, and the slip-on closure system with a central overlay.
attribute_logo: rectangular patch with 'FI' on the heel, gray on black background
